name: mail-mcp
description: macOS Mail MCP server for reads plus visible unsent compose, reply, and forward drafts.
long_description: Mail MCP is a local darwin-only Model Context Protocol server that talks to Apple Mail through Mail automation. It supports account discovery, mailbox listing, inbox-wide full message fetches, generic mailbox message reads, direct message lookup, and visible unsent compose, reply, and forward drafts. The tool surface intentionally excludes send support.
